titles.en: One of the Reasons for Differences between Narrations
One of the Reasons for Differences between Narrations

segments: : سأل انسان وأنا حاضر فقال: ربما دخلت المسجد وبعض أصحابنا يصلي العصر وبعضهم يصلي الظهر فقال: انا أمرتهم بهذا لو صلوا على وقت واحد لعرفوا فأخذوا برقابهم
arabic.text: : سأل انسان وأنا حاضر فقال: ربما دخلت المسجد وبعض أصحابنا يصلي العصر وبعضهم يصلي الظهر فقال: انا أمرتهم بهذا لو صلوا على وقت واحد لعرفوا فأخذوا برقابهم

segments: 1. [1/112] al-Tahdhib: Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. al-Husayn from Abd al-Rahman b. Abi Hashim al-Bajali from Salim Abi Khadija from Abi Abdillah عليه السلام, he (Salim) said: a man asked [him] while I was present: I happen to enter the Masjid and one of our companions is praying the Asr prayer while another is praying Dhuhr [why this divergence]? He said: I ordered them to do that, if they were all to pray at one time they would be known and it would be off with their necks.
en.ammaar-muslim.text: 1. [1/112] al-Tahdhib: Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. al-Husayn from Abd al-Rahman b. Abi Hashim al-Bajali from Salim Abi Khadija from Abi Abdillah عليه السلام, he (Salim) said: a man asked [him] while I was present: I happen to enter the Masjid and one of our companions is praying the Asr prayer while another is praying Dhuhr [why this divergence]? He said: I ordered them to do that, if they were all to pray at one time they would be known and it would be off with their necks.

narratorChain.raw: [1/112] التهذيب: محمد بن يحيى عن محمد بن الحسين عن عبدالرحمن بن أبي هاشم البجلي عن سالم أبي خديجة عن أبي عبدالله عليه السلام قال
